data.description: RIVIAN CFO: THE COMPANY IS NAVIGATING SUPPLY CHAIN RISKS AMID MACRO AND GEOPOLITICAL PRESSURES, WITH THE COMPLEXITY OF THE NEW VEHICLE LAUNCH SET TO WEIGH ON GROSS PROFIT IN Q2 AND Q3, WHILE NO IEEPA TARIFF IMPACT WAS RECORDED THIS QUARTER — THOUGH IT REMAINS A POSSIBILITY GOING FORWARD.

data.title: ANGHAMI REPORTS FY2025 REVENUE OF $99.3M, UP 27%, ON 3.5M SUBSCRIBERS AND LANDMARK STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS
data.description: Anghami Inc. (NASDAQ: ANGH), the top music and entertainment streaming platform in the MENA region, revealed its financial results for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Abu Dhabi, UAE, reported significant revenue growth during this period.
2026 Annual General Meeting notice released by Azerion.

data.title: XMax Inc. Launches AI Inference Platform and New AI and Corporate Websites
data.description: Today, XMax Inc. (NASDAQ:XWIN) unveiled its AI Inference Platform via subsidiary XMax AI Inc., alongside the launch of two new websites: ai.xmax.com for AI platform services and xmax.com as the new corporate website. This marks a crucial step in XMax's move into the AI inference platform sector.

data.title: Aeroméxico files Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Mexico City, April 30, 2026 - Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: AERO & BMV: AERO), known as Aeroméxico, disclosed the submission of its Form 20-F annual report for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing is obligatory as Aeroméxico continues to list its American Depositary Shares in the U.S., reflecting its commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance.

data.title: Algoma Steel Group Inc. to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results May 12, 2026
data.description: Algoma Steel Group Inc., a major Canadian steel producer known for steel plate and hot rolled sheet products, is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 12, 2026, following the market's closure. The company's stocks, listed as NASDAQ: ASTL and TSX: ASTL, will be reviewed in a webcast and conference call scheduled for May 13, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This event aims to analyze the recent financial performance, discuss key updates, and engage in a question-and-answer session.

data.title: Certus Honors Top Performers at P.E.A.K. Awards in Cabo San Lucas, Mexico
data.description: CERTUS, a rapidly expanding pest control company in the United States, organized its third annual P.E.A.K. Awards in Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. These awards represent the highest recognition within CERTUS and acknowledge the outstanding achievements of the company's top employees across service, sales, operations, and more. The event brought together the best performers in various fields and highlighted their contributions to the company's success.

data.title: TASC's $21M+ Investment Shows Why a Growth-Minded TPA Matters
data.description: TASC (Total Administrative Services Corporation) demonstrated their commitment to growth by investing in sales, platform expansion, and partner support. This investment, made in April 2026, emphasizes the company's focus on scalability for employers and brokers. Based in Madison, Wisconsin, TASC is the leading privately held third-party provider.

data.title: SmartCommerce Names Anj Yamsani Chief Technology Officer to Accelerate AI-Powered Commerce Innovation
data.description: An experienced technology executive with 20 years of experience in scaling platforms, artificial intelligence (AI), and commerce has joined SmartCommerce as the company intensifies its focus on enhancing the intelligent commerce layer that supports major global brands and retailers. This development was announced in Atlanta on April 30, 2026. SmartCommerce is dedicating significant resources to further develop its technology platform, with a keen emphasis on leveraging their expertise in AI, commerce, and platform scalability.

data.title: Zonos Acquires Evolve Trade Services to Build Customs Brokerage Directly Into Its Cross-Border Operating System
data.description: Zonos recently acquired a company which will help to prepare its customers for upcoming alterations in U.S. postal clearance regulations. This move will enable Zonos to broaden its platform's capabilities from checkout to clearance. The acquisition was finalized in St. George, Utah on April 30, 2026. Zonos, a leading AI operating system for facilitating cross-border trade, currently serves a vast customer base exceeding a certain number.

data.title: Ours Privacy Partners with WebMD Ignite to Turn Privacy-First Marketing Into a Growth Advantage
data.description: A recent partnership has been established between WebMD Ignite and Ours Privacy, linking WebMD Ignite's audience activation with Ours Privacy's HIPAA-compliant CDP. Healthcare marketers will now have access to a comprehensive growth infrastructure through this collaboration. The announcement was made in Houston on April 30, 2026 via PRNewswire-PRWeb. Ours Privacy, a CDP designed by healthcare marketers, focuses on maintaining HIPAA compliance.

data.title: NeuFluent Launches Clinical Intelligence Initiative to Accelerate Healthcare Innovation
data.description: Dr. Anthony Asher, a distinguished neurosurgeon and recipient of the prestigious 2026 AANS Cushing Medal, is leading a project focused on merging clinical information with computational analysis in the healthcare sector. Through the utilization of artificial intelligence (AI), the team aims to analyze health data towards generating innovative solutions for next-generation healthcare applications. This initiative is poised to revolutionize healthcare by introducing groundbreaking insights and approaches.
GRUPO SIMEC ANNOUNCES RESULTS OF OPERATIONS FOR THE TWELVE-MONTH PERIOD ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2025.

data.title: Amplifier One Launches Vendor-Neutral IT, Telecom, and Cybersecurity Advisory Firm Serving California, Arizona, and Nevada
data.description: A new advisory firm called Amplifier One has been established by IT expert Justin Wilson, offering services in IT, telecom, and cybersecurity across California, Arizona, and Nevada. The company partners with over 200 vendors to provide unbiased recommendations to clients. Launched on April 30, 2026, the firm is based in San Luis Obispo, California, and aims to serve clients at no additional cost.

data.title: Fareportal Announces Launch of Fareportal Enterprise Solutions, Enabling Partners to Own and Scale Travel Offerings
data.description: Fareportal has introduced a new enterprise division that offers a combination of worldwide travel inventory, advanced technology, and comprehensive operational services for both travel and non-travel firms. This development was announced in New York on April 30, 2026. Fareportal, known for its various travel brands, aims to leverage this new venture to cater to a broader market and solidify its position in the industry.

data.title: MyFreeScoreNow Reaffirms Commitment to Customers, Partners and Consumer Choice
data.description: In Seattle, the company MyFreeScoreNow is persisting with legal actions to retrieve its customer data, aiming to safeguard important information for their clients. This ongoing endeavor is crucial for recovering vital data and ensuring the security of customers.

data.title: What to Expect at the First-Ever Kentucky Derby Oaks Race on Primetime
data.description: Renowned star Nicole Scherzinger is set to sing the national anthem at the 2026 Kentucky Oaks at Churchill Downs in Louisville, Kentucky. The event, happening on April 30, 2026, promises a day filled with exciting experiences for the attendees. Churchill Downs has announced a revamped schedule of events for the race day, with expectations of a large turnout. This addition of Nicole Scherzinger to the lineup is expected to elevate the overall experience for all the guests.

data.title: Consumer Products Giant Clorox Shares Are Hitting New 52-Week Lows Thursday: Here's Why
data.description: Consumer products giant Clorox Corporation (NYSE: CLX) saw a decrease in shares following the release of its third-quarter financial results and updated full-year guidance. The company reported third-quarter revenue of $1.67 billion, remaining consistent with the previous year. However, organic sales declined by 1% compared to the same period last year. Despite this, Clorox exceeded expectations with revenue slightly surpassing the Street consensus estimate of $1.667 billion. Additionally, the company reported earnings per share of $1.64, surpassing the Street estimate of $1.55. Clorox shares are nearing critical levels, prompting questions about their current stability. The company noted mixed results in the third quarter, citing both positive momentum in certain segments and slower market share growth than anticipated.
